query:
UPDATE island_guides 
SET 
  bestTimeToVisit = 'November to April (dry season)',
  currency = 'Maldivian Rufiyaa (MVR)',
  language = 'Dhivehi (English widely spoken)'
WHERE bestTimeToVisit IS NULL OR bestTimeToVisit = 'NULL'
